content:
50 ki umar ke baad kai log sochte hain — kya ab bhi beema lene ka faayda hai? Jawaab hai: haan, bilkul. Lekin raanniti badal jaati hai.

## 50 ke baad LIC mein kya upalabdh hai?

### 1. LIC Jeevan Shanti — Pension ke liye

55+ varsh ke liye sabse achha. Ekamuusht rashi dein, har mahine/timaahi/saal zindagi bhar pension paayein.

Udaharan: 55 varshiya vyakti ₹10 lakh ekamuusht deta hai → har mahine ₹5,500-6,500 aajeevaan pension (anumaanitA).

### 2. LIC Saral Pension — Saral Niyamon Wali Annuity

40-80 varsh entry age. Lifetime annuity. Spouse ke liye Joint Life vikalp.

### 3. LIC Arogya Rakshak — Health Cover

50-55 ki umar mein health insurance milna mushkil ho jaata hai. LIC Arogya Rakshak mein 65 varsh tak entry hai. Fixed daily benefit aur surgical benefit.

### 4. LIC Cancer Cover (Plan 905)

50 ke baad cancer ka jokhim badhta hai. Agar abhi tak cancer cover nahi liya, toh yah sabse zaroori hai. Entry age 65 varsh tak.

## 50 ke baad ke liye Sujhaaee Gai Yojana

| Uddeshy | Plan |
|---|---|
| Zindagi bhar pension | Jeevan Shanti / Saral Pension |
| Health cover | Arogya Rakshak + Family Health |
| Cancer suraksha | Plan 905 |
| Maturity par lump sum | Jeevan Anand (15-20 varsh) |

Aaj hi 9415313434 par Ajay sir se baat karein.
contentHi:
50 ke baad: Jeevan Shanti (pension), Saral Pension, Arogya Rakshak (health), Cancer Cover 905. Deri se premium badhega.

9415313434 par call karein.
